meta.title: JJM SCSP/TSP Impact Evaluation - Karnataka
meta.notes: Financial in Rs Crore. Per-unit in Rs/beneficiary. SC=SCSP, ST=TSP. State-level General = download.pdf (Beneficiary = year-wise FHTC provided / physical progress; Financial = D1 Total Expenditure Central+State). District-level General = SC+ST (no district split in download.pdf). Habitation: SC/ST from Concentrated-Habitation FHTC reports (Format J5), General from household tap-connection progress (Format J36); coverage % = connections/households.
